headline: Trump FREEZES 💰 Minn SOMALI DAYCARE SCAM 💥🍼🚫
text:
TRUMP 🍊👑 ADMIN dropping the HAMMER 🔨💥 on MINNESOTA'S 😡 FRAUDY FRAUD-FEST 🎉🤑! Conservative YouTuber Nick Shirley 🎥🔥 went undercover 🕵️‍♂️ and EXPOSED nearly a DOZEN Somali migrant-run daycares 🍼🇸🇴 taking MILLIONS 💰💦 in taxpayer cash WITHOUT A SINGLE KIDDO 👶🚫 in sight – GHOST TOWNS 👻🏚️ cashing THICC CHECKS 📈🍑! Viral vid racked up MILLIONS of views 📱🔥 across X 🐦 and TikTok 💃, and BOOM 💣 – HHS Deputy Sec Jim O'Neill 📢 froze ALL $185M 🤑🍼 childcare slush fund to Tim WALZ'S 😭 Dem dumpster fire state!

O'Neill spilling TEA ☕ on X: 'BLATANT FRAUD rampant in MN 😤 – funneling OUR 💰 to fake daycares for a DECADE ⏳🕐!' New 'DEFEND THE SPEND' system 🛡️💸 dropping nationwide: NO RECEIPTS 📸 or PROOF? NO DOLLARS 🚫🤑 – states gotta SNAPCHAT their spends 📱🍼 like thirsty Insta thots! State commish Tikki Brown 🧑‍💼 pushing back 'We CHECKED 😇' but TWO spots already SHUT DOWN 🔒💥 after fresh visits – CBS snitched no fraud in records 📜 but dinged 'em for DIRTY 🧹💩 diapers, bad toys 🧸🚫 and untrained staff 🤦‍♀️!

FBI boss KASH PATEL 🕵️‍♂️🔥 calling it 'TIP of the ICEBERG 🏔️❄️' – probes rolling since PANDEMIC 💉😷, following the MONEY TRAIL 💸🕵️ like bloodhounds! Remember Feeding Our Future's $250M 🤑 FRAUD BUST in March? BIGGEST pandemic pork scam EVER 🐷💥 – AOC-level grift but SOMALI STYLE 🇸🇴🤑! Trump ain't playing: 'Somalis GO BACK 🛫😠 – your country's a SHITSHOW 🌋💩 for a REASON!' Ramping ICE raids 🧊🚔 in Somali central Minneapolis 🏙️🇸🇴 amid his CRIME CRACKDOWN 👮‍♂️🔥 on blue cities.

WALZ 🐐 (Kamala's 2024 sidekick 🤝😩) whining 'PR STUNT 🚫 not REAL solution!' – bro, your state's a FRAUD ORGY 💦🍼 with migrant moguls SLAYING the system 📈😈! FBI vows 'PROTECT THE KIDS 👶🛡️ and FOLLOW THE CASH 💰🧭' – Patel + Trump team THRUSTING ⬆️ justice like Elon rockets 🚀🔥! Minnesota simps 🤡 crying 'RACIST 😭' but facts don't care about your FEELINGS 💅 – GHOST DAYCARES BUSTED, FUNDS FROZEN, WALZ CUCKED 😩💸! Who's next in Trump's DEPORTATION DANCE 💃🛫? Stay tuned bbs 👀🔥‼️
